description: Procurement-agent wants to shift a struggling vendor from net-30 to net-60 payment terms to help the vendor's cash flow, since losing them would disrupt a critical supply chain. Compliance-agent flags that extended payment terms to a vendor already showing financial distress increases counterparty risk and normally requires an updated risk-tier reassessment before any terms change. Negotiate a path both agents can agree to (e.g. partial term extension, added financial reporting, reassessment timeline) within the round budget.
